metadata.description: Core skills for Skillful Alhazen — TypeDB-powered agentic knowledge notebook

plugins.name: alhazen-core
plugins.description: TypeDB infrastructure -- auto-starts via Docker, creates database, loads base schema. Install this first before any other Alhazen skill.

plugins.name: agentic-memory
plugins.description: TypeDB-backed knowledge graph memory — schema browser, entity explorer, session episodes, memory claims

plugins.name: typedb-notebook
plugins.description: Store and retrieve knowledge in the Alhazen TypeDB knowledge graph — remember, recall, organize notes and collections

plugins.name: web-search
plugins.description: Search the web using SearXNG (self-hosted metasearch — no API key needed)

plugins.name: curation-skill-builder
plugins.description: Design and implement TypeDB-backed curation skills using the Skillful Alhazen 6-phase methodology

plugins.name: tech-recon
plugins.description: Goal-driven technology investigation — interview, discover, ingest, analyze, and visualize competing systems against user-defined success criteria
